prompt: cria um PDF explicando Árvore Binária de Busca com simulado, quero estudar pra prova

assertions.text: PDF file was generated and has more than 1 page
PDF text contains C99 struct definition (struct No or typedef struct)
PDF contains an ASCII tree diagram
Simulado section has 5 or more questions
PDF contains a GABARITO section with commented answers
PDF covers inserir, buscar, and remover operations
